## lifecycle-test — Research Status

**Question:** Which database should we use?

**Context:**
Evaluating Postgres vs SQLite for our MCP server data.

**Phase:** locked
**Criteria locked:** Yes (2026-03-22)
**Peer review logged:** No
**TBD items remaining:** 0

**Findings (3):**
  0001 [confirmed] [MODERATE] Postgres handles concurrent writes better
  0002 [open] [UNVERIFIED] SQLite is zero-config
  0003 [open] [HIGH] Postgres benchmarks

**Candidates (2):**
  PostgreSQL — recommended
  SQLite — provisional

**Phase history:**
  2026-03-22 → research
  2026-03-22 → locked (Criteria weights frozen)

**Integrity:** All checks passed.
